title: selaginella amblyphylla
intro: Selaginella amblyphylla, also known as the two-leaved spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella amblyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
